title: Registration & Networking
description: Welcome to TEDxACEEC. Grab your badges, enjoy a warm cup of coffee, and get ready to be inspired.

title: Opening Ceremony
description: The official kickoff for our journey of ideas. We outline the day's theme and what to expect.

title: Session 1: The Sparks of Innovation
description: Our first lineup of brilliant speakers sharing ideas that are shaping the future of technology and society.

title: Lunch Break
description: Refuel and network. Catering provided, offering a variety of culinary delights.

title: Session 2: Cultural Shifts
description: Engaging talks focusing on the power of art, culture, and human connection in modern times.

title: Tea & Discussion
description: A short break to process the talks, engage with speakers, and share your own perspectives.

title: Session 3: Beyond Boundaries
description: The final session exploring the limits of human potential and what lies ahead.

title: Closing Remarks
description: Wrapping up the event. Key takeaways and a final expression of gratitude.
